mapper.select: SELECT id, note_id, image_id, note_user_id, image_user_id, parsed_image_name, note_title, is_cross_user, is_pass, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_image_mapping WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT id, note_id, image_id, note_user_id, image_user_id, parsed_image_name, note_title, is_cross_user, is_pass, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_image_mapping WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_note_image_mapping (note_id, image_id, note_user_id, image_user_id, parsed_image_name, note_title, is_cross_user, is_pass, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{mapping.noteId}, #{mapping.imageId}, #{mapping.noteUserId}, #{mapping.imageUserId}, #{mapping.parsedImageName}, #{mapping.noteTitle}, #{mapping.isCrossUser}, #{mapping.isPass}, 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_deleted = 0, image_id = VALUES(image_id), image_user_id = VALUES(image_user_id), is_cross_user = VALUES(is_cross_user), is_pass = VALUES(is_pass), note_title = VALUES(note_title)
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_note_image_mapping SET image_id = #{imageId}, image_user_id = #{imageUserId}, is_cross_user = #{isCrossUser}, is_pass = #{isPass}, is_deleted = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_note_image_mapping SET image_id = NULL, image_user_id = NULL, is_cross_user = 0, is_pass = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE biz_note_image_mapping SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE note_id IN
#{noteId}
